context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet game where player cares for Echo the cockatiel
context.role: Default resting state of Echo, the main character and only interactive pet
context.screen_position: Center of screen at x=64px, y=60px (standing on perch)
context.usage_scenario: Displayed when Echo is not performing any specific action - the baseline state that transitions to all other states. Player can interact with Echo in this state by tapping to pet, feeding, or cleaning.

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel bird in frontal view, standing upright on perch. Distinctive features: pointed crest on head (3-5px tall), circular cheek patches (4x4px each side), small triangular beak (3x2px), round body (approximately 20x24px), tail feathers extending downward (8-10px), two feet visible on perch
visual_specification.texture: Pure pixel art with no gradients or anti-aliasing. Hand-drawn organic edges with slight irregularity to convey warmth. Feather texture implied through pixel placement rather than detail lines.
visual_specification.outline: No outline stroke - silhouette defined by color contrast against background

animation.description: Frame 1: Eyes open, crest normal position. Frame 2: Eyes open, subtle body shift (1-2px). Frame 3: Eyes closed (blinking), crest normal. Frame 4: Eyes open, return to frame 1 position. Creates gentle breathing/blinking idle animation.

visual_specification.details: Eyes are 2x2px each. Crest feathers point upward in relaxed state. Cheek patches must always be #FF004D (signature feature). Tail feathers have 3-4 individual feather tips visible. Feet grip perch with 2px width each.

relationships.shared_with: All Echo states share the same base body structure, color palette, and 40x40px canvas size
relationships.differences_from: Unlike other states: crest is in neutral position (not raised/lowered), eyes blink regularly, no special particles or effects, standing upright (not hunched or animated)

explicit_negations: No realistic feather detail or texture
